deep_dive.title: A Sovereign, Open-Source Foundation Model for German and English
deep_dive.abstract: We present Soofi S 30B-A3B, a sovereign, open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) hybrid Mamba Transformer foundation model for German and English. Its hybrid design activates only 3B of 30B parameters per token and keeps the inference cache near-constant as context grows, giving it a decisive throughput advantage over dense models for long-context, high-concurrency deployment. Pretrained on roughly 27 trillion tokens with deliberately up-weighted German, Soofi S matches dense 14 to 27B models on aggregate English and German benchmarks while achieving the best code aggregates in both languages among 17 open base models, and outperforms every European sovereign baseline in our comparison, including ones far larger in active parameters. Among fully open models, Soofi S obtains the highest English and German evaluation scores, ahead of Olmo 3 32B and Apertus 70B. Soofi S was built end-to-end on the German Industrial AI Cloud, a sovereign HPC scale AI infrastructure operated by Deutsche Telekom in Munich. Soofi S will be released under highly permissive, open-access terms: weights, selected intermediate checkpoints, full per-source data accounting, hyperparameters, and training and evaluation code. Where source licenses permit, data-construction artifacts are released under permissive licenses; commercially licensed sources are documented with aggregate statistics and exact mixture accounting.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Mixture-of-Experts inference efficiency with hybrid Mamba Transformer design
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 混合Mamba Transformer的MoE推理效率设计
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 混合Mamba Transformer的MoE推理效率设计
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 混合Mamba Transformer的MoE推理效率设计
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Soofi is a sovereign open-source MoE hybrid Mamba Transformer model that activates 3B out of 30B parameters per token, offering superior throughput for long-context deployment.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 大型混合专家模型在推理时面临高计算开销和缓存增长问题。本文提出Soofi S 30B-A3B，一种混合Mamba-Transformer的MoE基础模型，每个token仅激活3B参数，且推理缓存随上下文增长几乎恒定。在约27万亿tokens上预训练后，该模型在英语和德语基准上媲美140-270亿参数的稠密模型，并在代码任务上表现最佳。作为完全开源的主权模型，它在长上下文高并发部署中具有显著吞吐优势。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 大型混合专家模型在推理时面临高计算开销和缓存增长问题。本文提出Soofi S 30B-A3B，一种混合Mamba-Transformer的MoE基础模型，每个token仅激活3B参数，且推理缓存随上下文增长几乎恒定。在约27万亿tokens上预训练后，该模型在英语和德语基准上媲美140-270亿参数的稠密模型，并在代码任务上表现最佳。作为完全开源的主权模型，它在长上下文高并发部署中具有显著吞吐优势。
